keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: List of keywords to search on TikTok. Each keyword will be scraped separately.

max_results_per_keyword.title: Max Results Per Keyword
max_results_per_keyword.description: Maximum number of videos to collect for each keyword.

request_delay_seconds.title: Delay Between Requests (seconds)
request_delay_seconds.description: Time in seconds to wait between paginated API requests to avoid rate limiting.

proxy_configuration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxy_configuration.description: Apify proxy configuration. Using residential proxies is strongly recommended for TikTok.
